-

(

[

==

[

+
1

.

(

()

>>

>>
k
;

s
;

>>

;

<int>

(

=

<

[

=

[

==
'L'

0
:

=

,

=
0
;

=
0
;

=
-
1
;

(

i
=
n
-
1
;
i
>=
0
;
--
i
)
{

(
a
[
i
]
==
0
)
{
++

;

else
{

(

==
0
)

;
maxi
+=
cnt
;
mini
=
max
(
cnt
,
last
+
1
);
last
=
mini
;
}

if
(
k
<

||
k
>
maxi
)

cout
<<
-
1
;

0
;

is_min
=
false
;

<int>
have_step
;

(

i
=
0

<

;

(!

=

(

<<

(

(

.
size
()),

-

+

+
1

' '

=
0

-

-

<

<

.
size

<<

[

]
+

[

[

]]

;

[

[

]
+
1

=
1
;
++

;
--

;

(

==
k
-
i
-
1
)

=

=

(
a
);

{

v
=

.
back
();

.
pop_back
();

<<
"1 "
<<

+
1
;

[

=
0
;

[

+
1

=
1
;

(
v
>
0

a
[

-
1

==
1

have_step
.
push_back
(
v
-
1

if
(
v
+
2
<
n
&&
a
[
v
+
2

==
0

have_step
.
push_back
(

+
1

<<
'\n'
;
